scripts.build: npm run build -w @opendesktop/web && npm run build -w @opendesktop/core
scripts.dev:core: yarn workspace @opendesktop/core run dev core start --port 8787
scripts.dev:core:ui: yarn workspace @opendesktop/core run dev core start --port 8787 --web-dist ./packages/web/dist
scripts.demo: yarn oc app init-demo && yarn oc session start demo
